data.title: Polkadot settles in Hong Kong: Stablecoin licensing and other regulations will promote Hong Kong's Web3 prospects
data.description: The Hong Kong Key Enterprises Office announced today that 18 companies, including the Polkadot Community Foundation, have settled in Hong Kong, bringing the total number of key enterprises to 102. Polkadot co-founder Vincent stated that he began working in education in Hong Kong three years ago. He expressed optimism about Hong Kong's low tax rates, abundant talent pool, and the government's recent regulatory oversight of stablecoin licensing. (Sing Tao Daily)

data.title: Institutional Investors Shift Cryptocurrency Strategies Amid Economic Changes
data.description:
According to PANews, Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley has observed a shift in institutional investors' cryptocurrency strategies, moving from a focus on market capitalization to more refined, stock market-like investment analysis. This change is driven by the evolving macroeconomic environment, with U.S. interest rates nearing 4%, prompting investors to prioritize asset quality similar to stock selection strategies.

Throughout this year, several asset management firms have filed for ETFs targeting assets beyond Bitcoin, including Bitwise's filing for an AVAX spot ETF. Horsley believes that Bitcoin must first be recognized as a store of value before it can evolve into a payment network. He also noted that as the ecosystem matures, future market volatility may be less pronounced compared to historical cycles.

data.title: Exodus Movement, a US-listed company, released its September financial report: Treasury size increased to 2,123 BTC.
data.description: According to Globenewswire, Exodus Movement, Inc., a publicly listed US company, released its September 2025 financial update and monthly metrics report. The report shows that the company's operations continue to generate Bitcoin revenue, with its Bitcoin treasury growing to 2,123 BTC by the end of September. This follows news from September 8th that Exodus Movement increased its holdings by 29 Bitcoins in August, bringing its total holdings to 2,116.

data.title: LBank announces strategic partnership with Crypto cultural IP “Yeti” on its 10th anniversary
data.description: LBank has officially announced a strategic partnership with the crypto cultural IP "Yeti," creating a more engaging and interactive community experience for LBank's 10th anniversary celebration. LBank will officially celebrate its 10th anniversary on October 15th, launching a series of events with a total prize pool of $2 million. This collaboration incorporates Yeti's unique visual language and humorous expression, and features a creative short film to encourage global user participation. Against the backdrop of the recent meme craze, this collaboration opens up new possibilities for content expression and cultural co-creation within the crypto industry.

data.title: The market capitalization of BSC Chinese Meme Coin "Hakimi" briefly exceeded $30 million, up over 750%.
data.description: GMGN market data shows that the market capitalization of the BSC Chinese meme coin "Hakimi" briefly exceeded $30 million, increasing by over 750% in just one hour. Odaily reminds users that meme coins are subject to significant price fluctuations and advises investors to exercise caution.

data.title: Russia losing over $120 million a year in missing tax from crypto mining
data.description:
Russia’s state budget is losing a colossal sum of money in terms of uncollected taxes from illegal crypto mining operations in the country. The government in Moscow has been trying to bring the whole business out of the shadows, but despite legalizing it last year, less than a third of Russian miners are registered with […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/russia-losing-120m-in-tax-crypto-mining/

data.description:
Block founder Jack Dorsey has pushed for a tax exemption for Bitcoin transactions, as Sen. Lummis confirms she’s “working on it. ”

data.title: Bank of France wants EU crypto regulation under Paris-based ESMA
data.description:
The Bank of France’s governor called for crypto oversight to be given to the European Securities and Markets Authority, and for tightening MiCA’s rules on stablecoin issuance.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bank-france-esma-mica-stablecoin-rules?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss%3F__%3D1760011043690%26sid%3De86ff320c36af90c&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 123,000 USDT with a 0.23% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 12:06 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 123,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 123,033.296875 USDT, with a narrowed 0.23% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Sharps Technology Announces Strategic Partnership with Coinbase to Expand SOL Treasury Strategy
data.description: Sharps Technology (NASDAQ: STSS) announced a strategic partnership with Coinbase to expand its previously announced Solana digital asset finance strategy. To date, STSS has acquired over 2 million Solana tokens, currently valued at over $400 million, with Sol trading at over $210.

data.title: AMINA Bank Partners with Polygon for Institutional Staking Services
data.description: According to Foresight News, Swiss-regulated crypto bank AMINA Bank has entered into a partnership with Polygon to offer institutional staking services for Polygon's native token, POL. This collaboration allows institutional investors to participate in the Polygon network through a compliant process. By staking POL with AMINA, investors can earn a 15% return.

data.title: Over $75 billion in cryptocurrencies linked to illegal activities may be seized by governments and converted into strategic reserves
data.description: According to Bloomberg, Trump is pushing governments around the world to build strategic cryptocurrency reserves using assets seized from criminals, betting that rising values ​​of tokens like Bitcoin (BTC) will boost overall economic growth. Research by blockchain analysis firm Chainalysis Inc. shows that the total value of cryptocurrency assets currently linked to illegal activity and stored on-chain exceeds $75 billion. These assets are held in online wallets or platforms, within the jurisdiction of law enforcement.

data.title: Opinion, a prediction market invested by YZi Labs, hints at launching a mainnet points program
data.description: Opinion Labs, a prediction market service provider invested in by YZi Labs, has hinted at the upcoming launch of its mainnet points program. According to a tweet from Opinion, before the mainnet trading incentives launch, users can join the X-ray Army and earn social points by posting high-quality content and actively engaging on social media. Alternatively, they can participate in the Pioneer Program, where they can upgrade their roles based on their contributions, unlocking points and potential mainnet incentives.

data.title: Crypto.com now supports deposits and withdrawals of USDT and USDC on the Aptos network
data.description: Crypto.com now supports deposits and withdrawals of USDT and USDC through the Aptos network. Users can experience faster and lower-cost stablecoin services within the platform through the Aptos network. Crypto.com has over 100 million users and serves over 90 countries. The launch of USDT and USDC deposit and withdrawal functionality on Aptos signifies further recognition and support of the Aptos ecosystem by mainstream crypto platforms, which will help enhance the liquidity of the Aptos network and the popularity of its applications.

data.title: Binance Futures to Implement UTF-8 Character Encoding for API Data
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, starting from 2025-10-09 11:00 (UTC), Binance Futures will introduce UTF-8 character encoding for data exchanged with the API, including all API push streams. This update aims to enhance the compatibility and efficiency of data transactions between users and the platform. API users are encouraged to update their configurations to ensure seamless trading experiences and avoid potential disruptions.

The implementation of UTF-8 character encoding is a significant step in optimizing data exchange processes. It allows for a broader range of characters to be accurately represented, which is crucial for global users who may utilize diverse character sets. This change reflects Binance's commitment to improving its technological infrastructure and providing a more robust trading environment for its users.

API users should take proactive measures to adjust their settings in accordance with the new encoding standard. Failure to update configurations may result in trading interruptions, which could impact the efficiency of operations on the platform. Binance emphasizes the importance of staying informed about these changes to maintain smooth trading activities.

For detailed information and updates regarding this change, users are advised to consult the full API Changelog provided by Binance. This resource will offer comprehensive insights into the technical adjustments and their implications for API users. By staying informed, users can ensure that their trading activities remain uninterrupted and aligned with the latest platform enhancements.

data.title: Two Prime Lending Reports Record Bitcoin Collateral Loans in Q3 2025
data.description: According to PANews, Two Prime Lending, a subsidiary of Two Prime, announced on Thursday that it issued a record $827 million in Bitcoin collateral loans during the third quarter of 2025. Since launching its operations in March 2024, the company has committed a total of $2.55 billion in loans. CEO and co-founder Alexander S. Blume stated that this milestone reflects the growing institutional acceptance of Bitcoin and the increasing demand for complex lending and derivative solutions. Two Prime's clientele includes companies such as CleanSpark, Hut 8, Kindly MD (Nakamoto), and Fold.

data.title: DApp Industry Sees Mixed Performance in Q3 2025
data.description:
According to PANews, recent data from DappRadar reveals a mixed performance in the decentralized application (DApp) industry during the third quarter of 2025. While decentralized finance (DeFi) liquidity reached an all-time high, user activity experienced a significant decline. The report indicates that the average daily unique active wallets for the quarter stood at 18.7 million, marking a 22.4% decrease from the previous quarter. Meanwhile, the total value locked (TVL) in DeFi protocols soared to a record $237 billion.

The report highlights a disparity between institutional capital inflow into blockchain financial platforms and retail participation in DApps. Despite the record levels of DeFi TVL, overall activity lagged, with retail engagement diminishing.

DappRadar noted a decline in active wallets across all categories throughout the quarter, with social and AI categories being the most affected. AI DApps saw a user loss of over 1.7 million, with daily users dropping from 4.8 million to 3.1 million. SocialFi DApps experienced a decrease from 3.8 million to 1.5 million users.

Ethereum maintained its position as the leading DeFi network with $119 billion in locked assets, despite a 4% quarter-over-quarter decline. Solana ranked second, with its TVL decreasing by 33% to $13.8 billion. The BNB Chain secured the third spot, witnessing a 15% increase in TVL.

data.title: BSC's daily gas usage exceeded 5 trillion, setting a new record, and 24 million Swap transactions were achieved in a single day.
data.description: BNB Chain recently reached a new milestone: daily gas usage exceeded 5 trillion, primarily driven by 24 million Swap transactions, representing 77% of total network transaction volume. Simultaneously, a standard gas price of 0.05 Gwei was fully adopted across the BNB ecosystem.
